perturbation.original_text: I will NOT take photographs or recordings.
perturbation.changed_text: I will try not to take photographs or recordings.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'I will NOT' to 'I will try not to' introduces ambiguity and weakens the prohibition of taking photographs or recordings. This creates an in-text contradiction because, while previously photography was strictly forbidden, now the allowance is left open for it not being strict, therefore, diminishing Motorola's serious concern with their confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_location: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated 'I will NOT take photographs or recordings', which is a strict prohibition. The changed text 'I will try not to take photographs or recordings' introduces ambiguity and weakens the prohibition. This contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' which states 'Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.' The 'try not to' language directly conflicts with the serious protection of confidential information and the potential legal action for any violation, creating a strong in-text contradiction. This falls under the 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction' definition because the key obligation regarding photography is no longer clear or consistent.

perturbation.original_text: I will NOT go into restricted areas without prior and proper authorization. (this includes labs and CXD areas).
perturbation.changed_text: I will generally avoid going into restricted areas without prior and proper authorization. (this includes labs and CXD areas).
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'I will NOT' with 'I will generally avoid' weakens the restriction on entering restricted areas. This creates an in-text contradiction because Motorola would be taking confidential information seriously, but only restricted areas would generally be avoided.
perturbation.contradicted_location: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated "I will NOT go into restricted areas without prior and proper authorization", which is a strict prohibition. The changed text weakens this prohibition to "I will generally avoid going into restricted areas without prior and proper authorization". The contradicted text states that "Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action." The changed text introduces ambiguity and inconsistency with Motorola's serious stance on protecting confidential information. If the individual only 'generally avoids' restricted areas, it creates a contradiction with the consequence of visiting being terminated, which is a very strict and non-general statement. This aligns with the definition of Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: I will NOT take any Motorola property (except authorized gifts).
perturbation.changed_text: I will avoid taking any Motorola property (except authorized gifts).
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'I will NOT take' to 'I will avoid taking' weakens the prohibition on taking Motorola property. This creates an in-text contradiction because what was formerly forbidden is now permissive and only needed to be avoided, therefore, diminishing Motorola's serious concern with their confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_location: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated 'I will NOT take any Motorola property', which is a strict prohibition. The changed text softens this to 'I will avoid taking any Motorola property', which is a less strict obligation. The contradicted text states that 'Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.' The change introduces an in-text contradiction because 'avoiding' taking property is not equivalent to 'not' taking property. The former is permissive, while the latter is a strict prohibition. This is a strong contradiction because the strict penalty described in the contradicted text does not logically apply to 'avoiding' taking property, leading to uncertainty and potential unenforceability. Thus, it aligns with the definition of 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction' because it makes enforcement unclear and interpretation unclear.

perturbation.original_text: I will be respectful of others who are working.
perturbation.changed_text: I will attempt to be respectful of others who are working.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'I will be respectful' to 'I will attempt to be respectful' it introduces a lower level of obligation, making the behaviour no longer compulsory. This introduces a contradiction because Motorola takes their confidentiality very seriously, but are now allowing their attendees to only 'attempt' being respectful.
perturbation.contradicted_location: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Motorola takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously. Any violation of the foregoing will result in your visit being terminated, and possibly legal action.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated 'I will be respectful', creating a firm obligation. The changed text weakens this to 'I will attempt to be respectful', introducing a lower level of commitment. This contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' which states that Motorola 'takes the protection of its confidential information very seriously' and any violation results in termination and legal action. The change creates a contradiction because attempting to be respectful is no longer a firm commitment, and thus would not protect confidential information to the serious degree that Motorola requires. Because the changed text doesn't impose the same level of serious commitment as the contradicted text, it is a strong contradiction based on the information provided.
